name: Sean Carlin
cooked:
I have just realised v2.0.0 of signing room which has alot of great improvements and also has a drop in web component so anyone can integrate with one Html Tag.

Full release notes here:

GitHub

Release v2.0.0 - The SDK Update (Web Component, Friction Modals & OpSec) ·...

Release v2.0.0: The SDK Update (Web Component, Friction Modals & OpSec) This is a major release marking the evolution of Signing Room from a standalone application into composable multisig infrastr...

Let me know what you think.

All the best,

Sean Carlin

raw:
I have just realised v2.0.0 of signing room which has alot of great improvements and also has a drop in web component so anyone can integrate with one Html Tag.

Full release notes here:

https://github.com/scarlin90/signingroom/releases/tag/v2.0.0

Let me know what you think.

All the best,

Sean Carlin
